title: Build is broken if GOBIN is not set
body: Have to explicitly set GOBIN if it is not set skopeo Makefile won't find go-md2man, while libpod makefile fallbacks to GOPATH[0]/bin when GOBIN is not set

comments.body: @cHolzberger are you using the latest commit from master? I may have broken that with my last PR :angel:
